name: Cloud IAM Key Compromise Response
description: Responds to suspected IAM access key compromise. Riggs AI evaluates whether key usage is anomalous by examining unusual API calls, regions, and services. Confirmed compromises trigger immediate key disablement, rotation via secrets manager, security lead approval for scope expansion, forensic extraction of all resources accessed by the compromised key, incident ticket creation, and team notification. Legitimate usage is documented with an analyst note.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: AWS Security Hub
required_integrations.reason: Source of IAM anomaly findings and API for disabling/rotating access keys

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create forensic investigation tickets for confirmed IAM key compromises

config.description: Triggers when anomalous IAM access key usage is detected by AWS GuardDuty or Security Hub

config.additional_instructions: Evaluate if IAM access key usage is anomalous - check for unusual API calls, regions, or services
config.description: AI-powered credential access analysis to determine if the IAM key activity represents a genuine compromise or legitimate usage
Routes based on whether the AI assessment determined the IAM key is compromised
Immediately disable the compromised IAM access key to prevent further unauthorized access
Generate a new access key for the IAM user and update the corresponding secrets manager entries
Requires security lead approval before expanding the investigation to extract all resources accessed by the compromised key

config.query: CloudTrail events for access_key_id={{trigger_1.alert.access_key_id}} in the last 72 hours
config.description: Query CloudTrail to extract all resources and API calls made using the compromised access key over the past 72 hours

parameters.summary: IAM Key Compromise: {{trigger_1.alert.iam_user}} — Forensic Investigation Required

config.description: Create a forensic investigation ticket with full details of the compromised key and all resources it accessed
Notify the security team with a comprehensive summary of the compromise and all response actions taken

parameters.note: Reviewed by Riggs AI (credential_access template). IAM key usage determined to be legitimate. Confidence: {{analyze_1.confidence}}. Assessment: {{analyze_1.summary}}

config.description: Document that AI analysis confirmed the IAM key usage was legitimate and not indicative of compromise
Cloud IAM key compromise response complete
